battleTraits.name: Noble Deeds
battleTraits.description: Earn Noble Deeds points when friendly units destroy enemy units. Spend points to return slain models to friendly units.

regimentAbilities.name: Deranged Transformation
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit. Add +2 to Move characteristic and +1 to Wound rolls until next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Victory Feast
regimentAbilities.description: If a friendly unit destroyed an enemy unit this turn, heal D6 wounds allocated to a friendly unit.
